positive: A whimsical, stylized forest scene featuring diverse, glowing flora and fauna, designed for central apparel print. The main subject is a cluster of bioluminescent woodland mushrooms and delicate, stylized vines, intertwining with silhouettes of various small woodland creatures (fox, bunny, owl) peeking through the foliage. Style: Highly detailed, vibrant neo-traditional tattoo art meets ethereal watercolor. Composition: Circular, symmetrical, and centrally composed. Lighting: Dramatic chiaroscuro with soft, magical glowing highlights emanating from the flora against a deep, midnight blue and forest green background. Color Palette: Deep jewel tones, electric blues, moss greens, and pops of luminous cyan and gold. Print-friendly: Clean lines, high contrast, optimized for full-bleed circular repeating pattern potential. Vectors and crisp edges are essential.
negative: blur, artifacts, bad anatomy, mutated, extra limbs, deformed, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, noisy, poorly drawn, jpeg artifacts, grayscale, monochrome, out of frame
